calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Apr-26-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of TWO Minors.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: JoAnn Prior.
Petitioners: Tera Chantara and Outhay Thephakaysone, are present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minors: Tanya Chantaranipapong and Wan-Arsa Chantaranipapong, were sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minors to: Tanya Chantara and Wan-Arsa Chantara.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Apr-19-2005 Reset To Apr-26-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a TWO Minors.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Mitch Lyon.
Petitioner: Tera Chantara, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minors.
Lacks the Minor's mother consent and no appearance, the OSC for Change of Name of the Minors is continued to April 26, 2005 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 218.
